characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: One of the hosts ofBizaardvark. Cool Big Sis: Shares the role with Frankie towards Zane and Rodney. Team Mom: In some episodes.

characters.name: Paige Olvera
characters.description: One of the hosts ofBizaardvark. Cool Big Sis: Shares the role with Frankie towards Zane and Rodney. Team Mom: In some episodes.

characters.name: Frankie Wong
characters.description: The other host ofBizaardvark. Cool Big Sis: Shares the role with Paige towards Zane and Rodney. Important Haircut: Gets shoulder-length hair as of Season 2, probably to stop getting it stuck in her locker. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: Frankie can be quite selfish, not to mention inconsiderate at times, but at the end of the day always comes through. Missing Mom: Frankie's mother abandoned her family some time ago, causing Frankie to develop a psychological disorder that prevents her from feeling emotions.

characters.name: Amelia Duckworth
characters.description: The host ofPerfect Perfection With Amelia, and a fashionista from a farm. Cool Big Sis: Is this to her little sister Willow in the past (and back again in the end of the episode) as seen in "Two Me's in A Pod". Friendless Background: Amelia is famous on Vuugle, but she's been such a loner all her life, never having made any friends in the real world. By the time Season 2 rolls around, we see how much of an outcast she really is in her first day at public school, and has so much trouble making friends. Only Sane Man: Amelia is marginally smarter than all the main characters as far as common sense goes, while they're either complete idiots (Dirk and Bernie) or lacking in foresight (Paige and Frankie). Rich in Dollars, Poor in Sense: Subverted and averted at the same time. When it becomes known that Amelia is incredibly wealthy, she offers to buy lunch for her friends as a favor. They repay her generosity by ordering the most ostentatious meal with completely unnecessary accouterments. When Amelia sees the bill of "1000 dollars", she gets angry because it's a frivolous waste of money.

characters.name: Dirk Mann
characters.description: The host ofDare Me Bro!and a goofy daredevil. Big Brother Mentor: Sometimes towards Bernie. Bruiser with a Soft Center: He's big and athletic, but alsoverysensitive. He also appreciates eyebrow-shaping tutorials andCali Beach High. Catchphrase: "Here we go!" The Ditz: Toamazinglevels that when he got trapped in a pile of debris, when at some point he picked up his mobile phone and a megaphone, he didn't realize the easiest ways to get help were right in his hands.

characters.name: Bernard "Bernie" Schotz
characters.description: Butt-Monkey: No-one ever takes him seriously. In "Bernie's In Charge", he doesn't get any respect despite the fact he's been chosen to be the temporary boss. Embarrassing Middle Name: Miriam. Flexing Those Non-Biceps: Does this occasionally. Know-Nothing Know-It-All: Bernie believes he's savvy about the business world, but he really doesn't know what he's doing and won't admit it. Older Than They Look: He could be easily mistaken for a Middle School Student.

characters.name: Zane and Rodney
characters.description: Two goofy best friends. Zane is the host ofZane Unboxedwhere he tells stories about what he unboxes; Rodney is the host ofWhat's In M'Hair?where he hides things in his hair. Four Plus Two: To the main cast. Hammerspace Hair: As part of his web show, Rodney hides various things in his hair that might often be too big to even fit there. Mundane Made Awesome: Before Zane unboxes something, he tells a story about what it could be. Sixth Ranger: Both debuted in season 3.

characters.name: Liam
characters.description: The stuck-up owner of Vuuugle who communicates through a monitor. Gentleman Snarker: Frequently.

characters.name: Grandma Roz Schotz
characters.description: Bernie's overprotective grandmother. Boxing Battler: She's a champion bareknuckle boxer. Happily Married: To Red Duckworth at the end of the series. Retired Badass: Served as a field medic in some undetermined war (possibly Vietnam). Super-Strength: Despite her age, she's still capable of punching a wall hard enough to go through it.

characters.name: Belissa
characters.description: Loony Fan: In oh so many ways. Got her father fired, sold his house (without asking!) to buy a new one and pays Vuugle to work as an intern, just to be closer to her idols. Then she makes her bedroom into an exact duplicate of Frankie's. She even engineered the worst day possible in order to "help" Bizaardvark get out of a creative slump.

characters.name: Willow Duckworth
characters.description: Berserk Button: Don't ask her to go back to the way she used to be, as she's tired of being compared to her sister. Name That Unfolds Like Lotus Blossom:Willow Moon Breeze.Really fits with her lifestyle of a earth child. Only Known by Their Nickname: Her real name is Sarah, but goes by the name "Willow" to avoid comparing herself to Amelia. Sibling Yin-Yang: She's the Earth Child to her sister Amelia's perfectionist.
